name: Sclorbo
key_features: Bardic Inspiration (d12, bonus action, 60 ft, regain on short rest)
Cutting Words (reaction: subtract inspiration die from enemy attack/ability/damage roll)
Peerless Skill (expend Bardic Inspiration on own ability checks)
Countercharm (action: advantage on frightened/charmed saves for allies within 30 ft)
Magical Secrets (spells from any class list)
Jack of All Trades (+half proficiency to non-proficient checks)
party_role_guess: Support / Face / Debuffer (Lore Bard, Cutting Words, massive skill list, Bardic Inspiration)
notes: Only level 16 — lowest in party. May have joined late or been rebuilt.
